svg.text: MariaDB database tuc_sickbay on localhost:3306 · 7 tables · source: db/migrations/001, 002, 003 · TUC-ICT-SRS-2026-004
Foreign keys declared in SQL: visits.patient_id, referrals.visit_id, referrals.patient_id, daily_health_checks.patient_id.

The visits to medications link is enforced in the API transaction, not by a constraint. List columns (allergies, chronic_conditions, presenting_conditions, symptoms) hold JSON arrays serialised by the API.
